channel.title: Data Science on Akhil Nasser
channel.description: Recent content in Data Science on Akhil Nasser

item.title: Data Science Skills
item.description: 1. SQL I demonstrate my familiarity with SQL. This exercise was carried out using the Microsoft SQL Server. There is a demonstration of Data cleaning, Data formatting and Data extraction of relevant information for further analysis. Github Link 2. Web Scraping Github Link 3. Data Cleaning Github Link 4. Tableau Photo by Pietro Jeng on Unsplash
